name: 4″ 9W LED Ultra Thin Downlight With Junction Box – 5CCT – ETL
description: Features: 4 inch size for easy installation in a variety of locations 10 watts power for efficient lighting with lower energy consumption 3CCT Selectable between 3K/4K/5K for customizable lighting options to suit any mood or activity External junction connection for simplified wiring and maintenance Does not require a construction can, making it an ideal solution for retrofit applications Ultra thin profile provides a sleek and modern look for any space ETL and Energy Star certified for quality and efficiency assurance Dimmable feature allows for versatile lighting control to create the perfect ambiance 3 Years Warranty for peace of mind and long-term value
short_desc: Specifications: Wattage: 9W Lumen Output: 750 lm Color Temperature: 5CCT – 2700K / 3000K / 3500K / 4000K / 5000K (Selectable) Input Voltage: 120VAC Power Factor: ≥0.9 Efficacy: 80 lm/W CRI: 80+ Beam Angle: 120° Dimmable: Yes, Triac Dimming Operating Temperature: -40°C to 50°C Housing Material: Aluminum / Polycarbonate Housing Color: White Ratings: IC Rated, Damp Location Lens Cover: Frosted Certifications: ETL, Energy Star LED Lifespan: 50,000 hours Warranty: 3 Years
